Copyright

Copyright Policy

Only share content you own or have permission to use.

Last updated: June 15, 2026

User content

Open Play Map lets users submit reviews, court details, photos, and related information. You should only upload or submit content you created, own, or have permission to share. Do not copy photos, text, maps, listings, or other content from another site or person unless you have the rights needed to use it.

Copyright notices

If you believe content on Open Play Map infringes your copyright, email scooppickleball@gmail.com with the information below so we can review it.

  • Your name, address, phone number, and email address.
  • A description of the copyrighted work you believe was infringed.
  • The URL or clear location of the content on Open Play Map that you believe is infringing.
  • A statement that you have a good-faith belief that the disputed use is not authorized by the copyright owner, its agent, or the law.
  • A statement that the information in your notice is accurate and, under penalty of perjury, that you are the copyright owner or authorized to act for the owner.
  • Your physical or electronic signature.

What happens after a notice

We may remove or restrict access to content while we review a copyright notice. We may contact the user who submitted the content, ask for more information, or take other steps that are appropriate under the circumstances.

Counter-notices

If your content was removed because of a copyright notice and you believe the removal was a mistake, contact us at scooppickleball@gmail.com. Include enough detail for us to identify the removed content, your contact information, and why you believe the content was removed by mistake.

Repeat infringement

Accounts that repeatedly submit infringing content may be restricted or terminated. We may also remove credits connected to infringing or unauthorized content.

Trademark and brand concerns

For concerns involving Scoop Pickleball branding, third-party trademarks, confusing business listings, or impersonation, email scooppickleball@gmail.com.
